Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}At Tatsumi East Police Station, you can purchase equipment for you and your party to use in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can also sell any equipment you aren't using, if you need a little extra cash.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}There's no telling what dangers Tartarus will throw your way, so be sure to gear up with the highest quality equipment you can afford.[n]{f 1 1}
